scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @sovio/tokens exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @sovio/core exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @sovio/ui exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @sovio/web exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @sovio/mobile exec tsc --noEmit
scripts.lint: eslint packages/core/src packages/tokens/src packages/ui/src apps/mobile/app apps/mobile/components apps/web/app apps/web/components
scripts.lint:fix: eslint --fix packages/core/src packages/tokens/src packages/ui/src apps/mobile/app apps/mobile/components apps/web/app apps/web/components
